data.name: Commander Babes
data.detailed_description:
故事:
這個故事將從Jun和他的童年好友Yui 開始。Yui因為她的惡作劇被懲罰到校長辦公室裡做清潔，Jun跟著她並幫她清潔。當Yui不小心打爛了一個古老的花瓶，兩位戰國將軍的神靈突然浮現。。。但它們居然是女的？！讓我們的主角Jun處理Uesugi Kenshin和Takeda Shingen將軍，幫她們融入現代社會。體驗Jun和美女將軍的滑稽經歷，跟著他們一起學習數學，英文，和女人的身體！

特點:
  • 15個與Shingen和Kenshin的成人情節，在Jun的幫助下讓她們真的成為女人。
  • 從原裝日本VN本地化。
  • 高清16:9和4:3圖質。
  • 幾小時的內容。
  • 所有美女帶有日文語音。
  • 帶有角色動態。
  • 帶有收藏展覽。

Commander Babe是一個英文本地化的VN，由著名日本制作室 Norn/Miel所創作。 我們在櫻桃吻吻試圖將日本游戲帶到全世界。

** 注意 **
所有角色都是18歲以上，沒有任何角色是未成年人士。

data.short_description: 從一個戰國時期的花瓶裡跳出兩隻戰國神靈將軍，但她們居然是。 。 。性感女武神？ ！我們的主人公俊發現自己有責任幫助上杉謙信和武田信玄適應現代日本，並彌補她們前生無法成為母親的遺憾。

  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo

  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

data.name: Commander Babes
data.detailed_description:
Our story begins with Jun, and his childhood friend Yui, cleaning the dean's office as punishment for Yui's latest prank. Of course, if nothing went wrong this would be a pretty bland story which leads to Yui knocking over a pretty old and expensive looking vase and from it emerge two Sengoku Era generals but... they're hot babes?! The ever-reliable Yui bolts as soon as the vase shatters leaving our protagonist, Jun, responsible for helping Uesugi Kenshin and Takeda Shingen adapt to modern Japan. Experience a wild ride alongside Jun and the commander babes as they unravel the secrets of modern mathematics, the English language, and the art of babymaking!


  • 15 intimate scenes with Shingen and Kenshin as Jun helps them experience the joy of being a woman.
  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Main female characters fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections

Commander Babes is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Norn/Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: From out of an old vase emerge two Sengoku Era generals but... they're hot babes?! Our protagonist Jun finds himself responsible for helping Uesugi Kenshin and Takeda Shingen adapt to modern Japan, as well as fulfilling their (after)life-long regret of not experiencing the joy of motherhood.
